nasb.text: The word of the Lord came to me saying, “What do you see, Jeremiah?” And I said, “I see a rod of an almond tree.”

esv.text: And the word of the Lord came to me, saying, “Jeremiah, what do you see?” And I said, “I see an almond branch.”

cnv.text: 耶和華的話又臨到我，說：“耶利米，你看見甚麼？”我說：“我看見一根杏樹枝子。”

ccb.text: 耶和华又对我说：“耶利米，你看见什么？”我说：“我看见一根杏树枝。”
